content: لاَزِم ياَكلوا بِإنتِظاَم عَلَشان اَلرّيجيم يِجي بِفايدة
translations: eng:you must eat regularly for the benefit of the diet to come

transcriptions.arabizi: laezim yaklu bi'intizaem Aalashaen ilreegeem yigi bi|fayda
